description_long: This object is a modern laptop with a large, rectangular display featuring a blue-tinted screen, set above a wide, flat keyboard area. The laptop's body is primarily dark gray, with a sleek and minimalistic design, and the screen is bordered by a thin bezel. The base includes a touchpad centered below the keyboard, and the overall construction appears to be made from a combination of metal and plastic, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. The hinge connecting the screen to the base is robust, allowing the screen to remain upright. No visible branding, stickers, or ports are present on the exterior surfaces. The laptop's design is typical for use in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or public spaces.
description: A sleek, dark gray laptop with a blue-tinted screen and minimalist design, featuring a wide keyboard area and central touchpad.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue screen, wide keyboard area, and central touchpad.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the screen and base, with the hinge visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unadorned back of the screen.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and hinge connection.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be on, displaying a blue-tinted blank screen with no visible content.
